instructions.title: Real Video Challenge
instructions.text: Watch a real video and take notes like you would in class
instructions.audio: This is a real-world challenge. Take notes as you watch.
tips: Use what you learned: keywords, bullets, symbols
Focus on main ideas and key facts

criteria.label: Captured main idea
criteria.example: How solar system formed from gas cloud

criteria.label: Notes are concise
criteria.hint: Used short phrases, not full sentences

perfect.audio: Amazing work! Your notes are clear, organized, and complete.

great.audio: Excellent job! Your notes would really help you study.

good.message: Good work! You passed the challenge! 👍
good.audio: Nice job! You're getting better at note-taking.

needsWork.message: Keep practicing! Try again after reviewing lessons 💪
needsWork.audio: Not quite yet. Review the lessons and try again.

sampleNotes.title: Example Good Notes
sampleNotes.content:
**How Solar System Formed**

→ 4.6 billion years ago
→ Started: giant gas cloud
→ Gravity pulled material together

**Formation:**
1. Sun formed first (center)
2. Planets from leftover material
3. Rocky planets close, gas giants far

★ Took millions of years
